tasks.title: Add a /quiz route for random root and scale-degree prompts
acceptance_criteria: The page shows a prompt formatted like 'Ab의 4도는 뭐야?'.
The prompt uses random roots and degrees.
done_definition: A route-level page renders the quiz UI.
The page follows the existing App Router file structure.

tasks.title: Implement reveal-answer and next-question behavior
acceptance_criteria: The user does not need to type an answer.
The primary button reveals the answer when the answer is hidden.
After reveal, the same primary button changes to '다음 질문' and generates another random question.
done_definition: The interaction is handled in a focused client component.
The next question resets the answer visibility.

tasks.title: Expose the quiz page in app navigation
acceptance_criteria: The global navigation includes a Quiz link.
done_definition: Navigation is updated without changing unrelated routes.

tasks.title: Verify build, lint, and browser behavior
acceptance_criteria: The /quiz page renders in the browser.
Visual verification confirms the one-button state transition and layout fit.
done_definition: Verification artifacts reference command and browser evidence.

assumptions: Scale-degree quiz answers should use the major scale by default.
Roots should include common sharp and flat spellings, including Ab.
risks: Enharmonic answer spelling can be ambiguous unless each root's major scale is explicitly defined.
Existing unrelated worktree changes prevent safely fast-forwarding main before the task.
